title: About us - We power life
note: Primary company source for Entergy's customer count, service territory, and electric utility business description.

title: Our operations
note: Describes Entergy's grid operations, transmission role, utility operating companies, and advanced-meter foundation.

title: Our electric transmission system
note: Supports the moat analysis by documenting Entergy's transmission system, regulators, and customers across the service area.

title: Entergy reports 2025 financial results, initiates 2026 guidance
note: Investor-relations source for 2025 earnings context and management commentary on industrial and data-center load growth.

title: 2025 Performance Report
note: Annual performance report used for 2025 profitability and operating context.

title: Market capitalization of Entergy (ETR)
note: Market-data source for the approximate late-May 2026 market capitalization used in the snapshot.

title: Entergy (ETR) Statistics & Valuation
note: Market-data source for current P/E ratio and valuation cross-check.

title: Open Energy Management System
note: Documents the open-source energy management system used as an alternative and enabling layer for distributed energy coordination.

title: Connecting Smart Energy to the Grid
note: Primary source for OpenADR as an open demand-response and distributed energy resource standard.

title: Demand Response Program Guide
note: Supports readiness and program-design claims for OpenADR demand-response deployments.

title: Microgrids
note: Defines microgrids and supports the technical feasibility of local controllable energy resources.

title: Microgrids
note: Government overview of microgrid benefits and distributed energy resource relevance.

title: CLOVER modelling framework for community-scale energy systems
note: Open-source modelling framework used as an alternative for community-scale mini-grid planning.

title: OpenNanoGrid
note: Open-hardware research project supporting the speculative home DC energy kit concept.
